name: NavDialog
description: Shared options for the file-navigation dialogs (SAVE_AS / CHOOSE_FILE / CHOOSE_FOLDER / CHOOSE_OBJECT / OPEN_OBJECT).

DEFAULT_LOCATION.description: Starting directory candidates (special words / ~ allowed). Forces the panel to open here every time, which overrides macOS's memory of the last-used folder; omit it to let the panel reopen at the last location the user navigated to.

USE_PATH_CACHING.description: Reuse a path chosen earlier in the same command run so a follow-up subcommand does not re-prompt. In-run reuse only; not cross-launch last-folder memory (that is macOS's, active when DEFAULT_LOCATION is omitted).

DIALOG_IDENTIFIER.description: Panel identifier for AppKit per-identifier state persistence; defaults to COMMAND_ID. macOS persists both window size/position and the last-used directory (as '<identifier> - NSOSPLastRootDirectory') and restores them on open. Use the same identifier across commands to share that state. The remembered directory is restored unless DEFAULT_LOCATION forces a directory (which overrides it).

ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES.description: UTI strings to filter selectable files.

DEFAULT_FILE_NAME.description: Pre-filled filename fragments (array; combined). Read by the shared nav function but only the Save panel uses it. NOTE: engine requires an array — a plain string is silently ignored.
